system.description: Series of alchemical compounds in vials that Antonio Ciliegia hides in his tunic. However, due to his proverbial bad luck, on rolls of 5-6 something goes wrong and Antonio suffers 1 Wound. Effects: 1. Fire (target and area catch fire, 1 Wound, continues burning until extinguished), 2. Thunder (target knocked thirty feet away, 1 Wound if hits obstacle), 3. Glue (adhesive compound paralyzes target until removed, glue can take 2 Wounds). Despite his skills and experience, Antonio's legendary misfortune makes his own alchemy dangerous to himself.
